scope: connected evolution, sandbox, persistence, bundle-verification modules; exclusions per scope-manifest

observations: Next.js/Node application has an SSE evolution pipeline and language-specific sandbox routes.
Evolution polling status is explicitly stubbed while SSE is the live path.
DynamoDB telemetry exists but is documented as unwired.
Run persistence has DSQL and local/demo fallback branches.
hypotheses: Polling status is not operationally equivalent to the live SSE path.
deductions: Cross-instance duplicate prevention is not established because activeJobs is process-local.
decision: UNDETERMINED: treat SSE and bundle verification as primary; defer polling and telemetry integration claims.

adi.statement: Polling-based evolution status may not be operationally equivalent to the live SSE path.
A safe request-level comparison of SSE and polling responses would falsify or support equivalence.
Abstained: no target execution, deployment observation, or production telemetry was authorized.

skills.concrete_action: Loaded all 20 Markdown skills; applied A-D-I, provenance, and honest-degradation rules to scope and handoffs.
